🔎:

  • [FASTENING]: The Pants Fastens with Button, Making It Easy to Put on and Take Off

  • [FITTING]: This Denim Jeans Has a Slim Fit, Making It Flattering and Stylish
  • [MATERIAL]: The Jack & Jones Boys Denim Jeans Is Made of 79% Cotton,19% Polyester & 2% Elastane, Making It Stretchy and Comfortable to Wear
  • [WASHABLE]: The Denim Jeans Is Machine Washable, Making It Easy to Care For
